assumptions: The developer has a browser and can complete ClickHouse Cloud signup or use the public Playground without an account.
No ClickHouse Cloud organization or service is assumed to exist yet.

developer_goal: Reach a first successful ClickHouse query using the vendor's primary getting-started route.

first_success.outcome: A ClickHouse query returns a visible result on the selected surface.
first_success.observable_signal: For Cloud SQL console, SHOW databases returns the default database list; for Playground cURL, the command prints Play ClickHouse.

route_selection.surface: ClickHouse Cloud console self-service web, with Playground as a documented accountless alternate
route_selection.rule: Official Cloud quick start calls creating a Cloud service the quickest and easiest general route and begins at account creation; Playground is a complete no-account peer that conflicts with the account-creation measurement boundary.

candidates.name: ClickHouse Cloud email signup, onboarding wizard, SQL console SHOW databases
candidates.reason: Vendor-selected quickest route, but email signup fields, password rules, and post-submit states are not enumerated; default Scale tier sizing may imply billing exposure.

candidates.name: Google or Microsoft SSO or cloud marketplace signup then SQL console
candidates.reason: Named peer account branches without intermediate steps or shared return state into the onboarding wizard.

candidates.name: ClickHouse Playground accountless cURL or web SQL
candidates.reason: Fully demonstrated without signup, but it is not the Cloud quick start the docs call quickest and easiest and skips account creation.

candidates.name: Open-source local quick start
candidates.reason: Changes the surface to local installation rather than the vendor Cloud route.

required_path.action: Create a ClickHouse Cloud account using email, SSO, or a marketplace route if the Cloud path is selected.

required_fields.label: Signup method
required_fields.notes: Email, Google SSO, Microsoft SSO, AWS Marketplace, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure are named peers.

required_fields.label: Email and password
required_fields.notes: Quick start says create an account and verify email within 24 hours but does not list form fields.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can log in and the Cloud onboarding wizard starts.

required_path.action: If using email signup, verify the email address via the emailed link.
required_path.observable_result: The email identity is verified for the new account.

required_path.action: Complete the onboarding wizard by choosing region and service name, optionally adjusting replica sizing, then create the service.

required_fields.label: Replica size minimum and maximum
required_fields.notes: Optional customization; defaults place new orgs on Scale tier with 3 replicas.

required_path.observable_result: The ClickHouse Cloud service is running and onboarding completes.

required_path.action: In SQL console, create a query tab and run SHOW databases.
required_path.observable_result: The console lists the default databases.

prerequisites.description: Marketplace signup branches require an authorized cloud-provider billing relationship outside ClickHouse.

external_gates.description: Email signup requires verifying email within 24 hours.
Default Scale-tier service creation may involve plan or payment entitlements not fully spelled out on the quick start.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email verification delivery on the email signup route.
Service provisioning during Create service before SQL console use.

platform_outcomes.description: ClickHouse Cloud creates the service and redirects to the web SQL console after onboarding.

excluded.item: Creating helloworld tables and inserting sample rows
excluded.reason: Presented after the SHOW databases connection check under Add data.
Optional after SQL console is already available.
Recommended after first queries, not required to run SHOW databases.

sources.title: SQL Console
evidence_supported: Web SQL console as Cloud query surface

sources.title: ClickHouse Cloud sign up
evidence_supported: Form fields not reconstructable from static unauthenticated shell alone

uncertainties.question: What exact fields, agreements, and password rules appear on email signup, and how do SSO and marketplace routes converge on the onboarding wizard?
uncertainties.impact: Account-creation actions and external gates cannot be finalized for the Cloud path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account walkthroughs of email, Google SSO, Microsoft SSO, and one marketplace route through first wizard screen.

uncertainties.question: Does every new trial or free signup avoid a payment method even when the wizard defaults to Scale tier with multi-replica sizing?
uncertainties.impact: A payment or plan gate would change route eligibility under the no-payment preference.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official plan/billing statement or a fresh-account capture of Create service entitlements.

uncertainties.question: Should first success be measured on Cloud SQL console or on the accountless Playground example?
uncertainties.impact: Playground removes account creation entirely and conflicts with the corpus account-creation boundary while being operationally shorter.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human judgment applying SELECTION-POLICY to Cloud-versus-Playground for this atlas entry.
